title: Graduation Party 毕业派对
scene: 同学们举办毕业派对，拍照留念，互相祝福。

lines.en: Anna, can you believe we are graduating?
lines.zh: Anna，你敢相信我们就要毕业了吗？

lines.en: I know! It feels like yesterday we started school.
lines.zh: 是啊！感觉就像昨天才开始上学一样。

lines.en: I will miss you so much. You are my best friend.
lines.zh: 我会很想你的。你是我最好的朋友。

lines.en: I will miss you too. Let us take a picture together.
lines.zh: 我也会想你的。我们一起拍张照吧。

lines.en: OK, stand next to me. Say cheese!
Cheese! This photo will be my favorite.
lines.zh: 茄子！这张照片会成为我的最爱。

lines.en: What middle school are you going to?
I am going to Sunshine Middle School.
I am going there too! We will still be together!
lines.zh: 我也是！我们还能在一起！

lines.en: Really? That is wonderful! Best day ever!
lines.zh: 真的吗？太好了！最棒的一天！
